name: Liquid
description: Liquid is a non-custodial trading app (iOS, web, and more) that routes activity through Hyperliquid, offering hundreds of markets across crypto, FX, equities, and commodities with configurable leverage and a simplified long/short flow. It targets retail traders who want a mobile-first experience with low-friction access and self-custody; the app is published by HyperSports, Inc. and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Hyperliquid.
